title: crataegus lassa var. recurva
intro: Crataegus lassa var. recurva, commonly known as the recurved hawthorn, is a variant of the Crataegus lassa plant species, belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat cardiovascular and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, anthocyanins, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, improving circulation, and reducing inflammation. Crataegus lassa var. recurva can be prepared into various herbal formulations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are available commercially or can be made at home under proper guidance.
